_publications._publicationTitle: Ras-driven transcriptome analysis identifies aurora kinase A as a potential malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor therapeutic target.

_contextSnippet: The expression of the HA-tagged HRAS12V transgene was validated in myelinating and non-myelinating Schwann cells using an anti-HA antibody by immunolabeling teased sciatic nerve preparations
resourceName: anti-HA antibodies (Santa Cruz Biotechnology, Inc., Santa Cruz, CA)
details: Successfully validated expression of HA-tagged HRAS12V transgene in myelinating and non-myelinating Schwann cells by immunolabeling teased sciatic nerve preparations.
